creator: av@holymail.biz
text:
Hi

I don't have access to that host where the problem occured. I've
tested it on i386 8.2-release host with a very similar ruleset - looks
like the patch fixes the problem.

Thanks.

2011/5/30 Andrey V. Elsukov <ae@freebsd.org>:
> Hi,
>
> It seems your problem is the same as described in kern/147720.
> Can you test the following patch?
> http://people.freebsd.org/~ae/ipfw_fwd.diff
>
> --
> WBR, Andrey V. Elsukov
>



-- 
Andrey Voitenkov
